events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial construction, I&C loop checks & wiring, observed missing surge protection on field side. Work tested/inspected. Reference loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need compare field condition against referenced document. Decision fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Missing surge protection likely non-compliant per drawings/specs/standards. Need risk? Could be medium/high. Surge protection missing on field side can damage instrumentation, cause failure, safety? In commercial I&C, surge protection often required by specifications/loop drawings. Missing it means installed-defective and non-compliant. Work stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 90? value irrelevant 0. confidence high. event_time etc irrelevant. order empty. workable empty. findings: missing surge protection on field side. actions: install specified surge protective device per loop drawings and manufacturer instructions, retest loop. rationale. references: loop drawings, ISA 5.1, maybe NEC/UL? But only given references. Use them. Need ensure JSON valid.
